meaning: n.下坡,退步adj.下坡的,使降级,小看
examples: PPR will be keen to avoid a downgrade.
House Republicans own this credit downgrade.
Then there is the impact of a ratings downgrade.
That contrasts with about two dozen that have been on the receiving end of a downgrade.
Add to the list the after-shock of the congressional debt ceiling battle and the debt downgrade.
